supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml:
Fabric customers with tenants located in West US2 region may experience latencies and intermittent issues while interacting with the service due to an Azure storage outage. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.

active.detailsHtml:
Fabric customers using the Teams mobile app may experience issues loading reports within the app. Engineers are investigating the issue and updates will be provided soon. As a workaround, customers may open the reports in a browser.
